name: Big Boy Barbecue Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons freshly ground black pepper, coarsely ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the minced garlic and mix well.
2. Pour the mixture into pint jars for storage.
3. The sauce may be stored in the refrigerator for several weeks.
4. For longer storage, freeze the sauce in a freezer-safe container.
5. About an hour before using the sauce, add the minced garlic if desired.
6. Makes 6 pints.
